name: Sourdough French Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water (110 to 115 F).
2. Add the remaining ingredients one at a time.
3. Mix until smooth and knead lightly.
4. Return dough to a bowl and let rise until doubled in size.
5. Turn dough out onto a floured board.
6. Divide dough into two equal parts.
7. Shape each part into an oblong, then roll tightly from one side.
8. Seal the outside edge by pinching and shape into desired size.
9. Place loaves on greased baking sheet and let rise until doubled again.
10. Make diagonal cuts on top of loaves with a razor blade or very sharp knife.
11. Brush lightly with water for a crisp crust.
12. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) for about 25 minutes, or until brown and done.
(Note: Makes 2 loaves, each yielding approximately 18 slices. Serving sizes are approximate.)
